items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ TEEN LOLA Best Seller Recommendation❇️
CE Autumn/Winter New Teen Lola Signature Print Handbag 👜.
Another masterpiece from the Arc de Triomphe family. Teen Lola is online with TRIO MPHE snap closure. It features 1 interior compartment and 1 interior flat pocket. The long shoulder strap is detachable and adjustable. The bag presents an ultimate French elegance style. It can easily fit a phone, compact powder, lipstick, small card holder, and other daily necessities! Not only is it small, exquisite, and cute, but it can also be carried by hand, crossbody, or over the shoulder for various styles 🫶🏻
Model: 119533
Color: Burgundy (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 20x11.5x5cm
